'''Dles IV''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] penal world in the [[Dles system/Legends|Dles system]] of the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]]. Although the colony was under direct jurisdiction of [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]], the nearby [[Delta Base|Sulorine Sector HQ]] contributed supplies and manpower when needed.

{{Planet-stub}}
